title: Taur, il re della forza bruta
writer: Sofia Scandurra, Antonio Leonviola, Fabio Piccioni
actors: Joe Robinson, Harry Baird, Bella Cortez
plot: The warlike men of Kixos murder the king of Surupak and abduct his two daughters, Jia and Tuja. Jia's bridegroom Syros asks the mighty warrior Taurus for assistance. Taurus faithful companion Ubaratuta will give Taurus a hand to d...
